title: Kenyan leader sparks uproar after  mocking Nigerians' spoken English

content: Cyril Ramaphosa said the suspension was because of the critical role Fannie Masemola plays in fighting crime.

content: Opposition parties accused security forces but the official report does not say who was responsible.

title: Environmental crisis in Russian city after drone attack on refinery

title: Nato says 'no provision' to expel members after report US could seek to suspend Spain

content: Will it be Manchester City or Arsenal for the Premier League title? BBC Sport gets pundits, reporters and fans to predict each of their remaining fixtures - and who will win the league.
